name: Vehicle SEO landing page renders brand/model content and its CTA links to a pre-filled configurator
description: Verifies /arac/toyota-corolla-sedan renders vehicle-specific hero copy, a price tier table, and that the primary CTA deep-links into the configurator with the vehicle pre-filled.

planSteps.description: The page heading shows 'Toyota' and 'Corolla Sedan'
The breadcrumb navigation shows 'Ana Sayfa' followed by 'Toyota Corolla Sedan'
A 'Paket seçenekleri' section is visible listing at least one priced package with a price shown in ₺
Click the 'Hemen Tasarla' button in the hero section
The browser navigates to a URL whose path is /olusturucu and whose query string contains marka=Toyota and model=Corolla+Sedan (or URL-encoded equivalents)
